title: Enum и [Flags]: value type под именами

cards.code: using System; [Flags] enum Perm { None=0, Read=1, Write=2, Exec=4 } var p = Perm.Read | Perm.Write; Console.WriteLine($"{p} {(p & Perm.Write) == Perm.Write} {(p & Perm.Exec) == Perm.Exec}");

cards.prompt: enum Size : byte { S=1,M=2,L=4 }: (int)Size.L и GetUnderlyingType(...).Name?
cards.code: using System; enum Size : byte { S=1, M=2, L=4 } Console.WriteLine($"{(int)Size.L} {Enum.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(Size)).Name}");
using System; enum Color { Red=1, Green=2 } Color c = default; Console.WriteLine($"{(int)c} {c} {Enum.IsDefined(typeof(Color), c)}");
